document.name: TCR The Club of Riverdale - Toddler Sing Along Birthday Party
document.shortDescription: Weekend toddler birthday package in Riverdale with interactive sing-along music, instruments, games, food, cupcakes, and party hosts.
document.longDescription:
TCR The Club of Riverdale lists a dedicated Toddler Sing Along Party birthday package for young children in Riverdale, Bronx. The official birthday brochure describes it as a 2-hour interactive music party with instruments and games, geared for younger parties ages 1-3. The general TCR party page says party packages are customizable, include private party rooms, dedicated party hosts, setup and cleanup, and access to TCR's facilities for celebration.

The official brochure lists Package #3, Toddler Sing Along Party, at $1,200 for a 2-hour event with interactive music for 15 kids. It also states party times are Saturdays and Sundays from 12:00 p.m. to 6:00 p.m., with alternate times available upon request. The brochure notes a 20% discount on base package pricing for TCR members and junior program participants.

The official parties page says TCR offers add-ons such as pizza, cake, themed decorations, and goody bags, while the brochure says party packages include menu and decoration selections. Because ClassScout's provider schema expects a single numeric field, the stored price is the published package total rather than a per-child or per-session class rate. The official brochure's age guidance is 1-3 years, so the record maps that to ClassScout's 0–2 and 3–5 age bands.

Contact details listed on the official TCR party sources: The Club of Riverdale, 2600 Netherland Ave, Riverdale, NY 10463; phone 718-796-9099; email info@tcr-nyc.com.

Sources: https://tcr-nyc.com/kids-programs/parties-and-events/ https://tcr-nyc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/TCR-Birthday-Party-Brochure.pdf
document.announcementDescription: The official TCR birthday brochure lists Toddler Sing Along Party times on Saturdays and Sundays from 12:00 p.m. to 6:00 p.m.
